title: [Bug]: `stddev_pop()` 返回了预期之外的NULL
description: master分支版本，对于参数为常数的`stddev_pop()`，返回了预期之外的NULL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 10.0, 'A');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, category) VALUES (2, 20.0, 'B');
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_data WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_data WHERE category = 'B';
key_bug_features: stddev_pop() returns unexpected NULL for constant parameters
